name: Stone
description: A common solid block found underground. Mined fastest with a pickaxe. Drops cobblestone unless mined with Silk Touch.

name: Cobblestone
description: Dropped when mining stone without Silk Touch. Used for tools, furnaces, and building.

name: Granite
description: An igneous rock variant of stone. Can be polished for decorative building.

name: Diorite
description: A white stone variant. Can be polished for decorative use.

name: Andesite
description: A gray stone variant. Can be polished for decorative building.

name: Deepslate
description: A dark stone variant found deep underground. Harder than stone and used for building.

name: Cobbled Deepslate
description: Drops from mining deepslate. Used for tools and building.

name: Iron Ore
description: Iron ore is found underground, usually between Y=-64 and Y=72. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Smelt it to get iron ingots.

name: Deepslate Iron Ore
description: Iron ore embedded in deepslate. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Drops iron ore.

name: Gold Ore
description: Gold ore is found underground around Y=-16 and abundantly in Badlands. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Smelt to get gold ingots.

name: Deepslate Gold Ore
description: Gold ore embedded in deepslate. Requires an iron pickaxe or better.

name: Diamond Ore
description: Diamond ore is found deep underground, most commonly around Y=-59. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Drops diamonds.

name: Deepslate Diamond Ore
description: Diamond ore embedded in deepslate. Requires an iron pickaxe or better.

name: Coal Ore
description: Coal ore is common underground and in mountains. Mined with any pickaxe. Drops coal for torches and fuel.

name: Deepslate Coal Ore
description: Coal ore embedded in deepslate. Mined with any pickaxe. Drops coal.

name: Redstone Ore
description: Redstone ore is found deep underground. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Drops redstone dust.

name: Lapis Lazuli Ore
description: Lapis ore is found underground. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Drops lapis lazuli.

name: Copper Ore
description: Copper ore generates in larger ore blobs underground. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Smelt into copper ingots.

name: Emerald Ore
description: Emerald ore is found in mountain biomes. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Drops emeralds.

name: Obsidian
description: Created when water touches a lava source. Requires a diamond or netherite pickaxe. Used for nether portals and enchanting tables.

name: Crafting Table
description: Expands the crafting grid to 3x3. Crafted from 4 wooden planks.

name: Furnace
description: Smelts ores, food, and other items using fuel. Crafted from 8 cobblestone.

name: Blast Furnace
description: Smelts ores and metal items twice as fast as a furnace. Crafted from a furnace, iron ingots, and smooth stone.

name: Smoker
description: Cooks food twice as fast as a furnace. Crafted from a furnace and logs.

name: Chest
description: Stores up to 27 stacks of items. Crafted from 8 wooden planks.

name: Barrel
description: A storage block that can be opened even when blocks are placed on top. Crafted from wood slabs and planks.

name: Ender Chest
description: A chest whose contents are shared across all ender chests. Crafted from obsidian and an eye of ender.

name: Bedrock
description: An indestructible block found at the bottom of the world and in the End and Nether roofs.

name: Dirt
description: A common surface block. Can be tilled into farmland with a hoe.

name: Grass Block
description: Dirt covered in grass. Common in the Overworld surface. Can be silk-touched.

name: Farmland
description: Dirt tilled with a hoe. Required for growing crops. Turns back to dirt if jumped on.

name: Sand
description: A gravity-affected block found in deserts and beaches. Smelt into glass.

name: Red Sand
description: A red variant of sand found in Badlands biomes. Can be smelted into glass.

name: Gravel
description: A gravity-affected block found underground and on beaches. Drops flint occasionally.

name: Clay
description: Found underwater in rivers and lakes. Smelt into bricks or terracotta.

name: Terracotta
description: A hardened clay block found in Badlands. Can be dyed into colored variants.

name: Wool
description: Dropped from sheep or crafted from string. Used for beds and decorative blocks.

name: Oak Log
description: Wood from oak trees. Can be crafted into planks and sticks.

name: Spruce Log
description: Wood from spruce trees. Crafted into dark-colored planks.

name: Birch Log
description: Light-colored wood from birch trees. Crafted into planks.

name: Jungle Log
description: Wood from jungle trees. Crafted into planks.

name: Acacia Log
description: Wood from acacia trees. Crafted into reddish planks.

name: Dark Oak Log
description: Wood from dark oak trees. Crafted into dark planks.

name: Mangrove Log
description: Wood from mangrove trees found in mangrove swamps.

name: Cherry Log
description: Pink-tinted wood from cherry trees. Crafted into pink planks.

name: Oak Planks
description: Basic wooden planks. Used for crafting, sticks, and building.

name: Glass
description: Transparent block made by smelting sand. Used for windows and bottles.

name: Torch
description: Provides light and melts snow nearby. Crafted from coal and a stick.

name: Lantern
description: A brighter light source than a torch. Crafted from iron nuggets and a torch.

name: Glowstone
description: A bright light source found in the Nether. Drops glowstone dust.

name: Sea Lantern
description: A bright underwater light source found in ocean monuments.

name: Enchanting Table
description: Used to enchant tools, weapons, and armor. Requires obsidian, diamonds, and a book.

name: Anvil
description: Used to repair, rename, and combine enchanted items. Crafted from iron blocks and ingots.

name: Netherrack
description: The main stone of the Nether. Burns indefinitely when lit.

name: Soul Sand
description: Slows movement and is used for nether wart farms and soul fire. Found in the Nether.

name: Soul Soil
description: Found in soul sand valleys. Used to create soul fire and soul torches.

name: Blackstone
description: A dark stone found in Bastion Remnants. Can be used as a substitute for stone recipes.

name: Basalt
description: A dark pillar-like block found in the Nether. Can be polished.

name: End Stone
description: The main block of the End islands. Requires a pickaxe to mine.

name: Purpur Block
description: A decorative block found in End cities. Crafted from popped chorus fruit.

name: Prismarine
description: A sea-themed block found in ocean monuments. Crafted from prismarine shards.

name: Sponge
description: Absorbs water in a 7-block radius. Wet sponge can be dried in a furnace.
